heading: Administrative services and support
label: 1964 Administrative services and support
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to renumbering by .section 4214 of this titlePub. L. 119–65

children.heading: Provision of services
children.label: a Provision of services
children.text: The Under Secretary may provide personnel, facilities, and other administrative services to the Foundation, including reimbursement of expenses, not to exceed the current Federal Government per diem rates, for a period of up to 5 years beginning on .December 18, 2020

children.heading: Reimbursement
children.label: b Reimbursement
children.text: The Under Secretary shall require reimbursement from the Foundation for any administrative service provided under subsection (a). The Under Secretary shall deposit any reimbursement received under this subsection into the Treasury to the credit of the appropriations then current and chargeable for the cost of providing such services.
